name: Iterative Studio
description: A multi-mode AI platform with 5 operational modes: Refine, Deepthink, Adaptive Deepthink, Agentic, and Contextual. Based on the Iterative Contextual Refinements system. Original project link: https://github.com/ryoiki-tokuiten/Iterative-Contextual-Refinements
intro_msg:
Welcome to Iterative Studio! I support 5 operational modes:

1. **Refine** - Code refinement with feature suggestions and bug fixing
2. **Deepthink** - Multi-agent strategic reasoning for complex problems
3. **Adaptive** - Flexible strategic reasoning with self-guided tools
4. **Agentic** - Tool-based refinement with file operations and research
5. **Contextual** - Iterative content generation with memory

Just describe what you need, and I'll automatically select the best mode for your task!
starter_prompts: Review this code and suggest improvements
Help me solve this complex technical problem
Search for papers on transformer architectures
Write a technical blog post about microservices

spec.name: Iterative Studio
spec.description: Multi-mode AI platform with routing-based orchestration

agents.name: Mode Controller
agents.description: Classifies user requests into operational modes

properties.default_system_prompt:
You are the Mode Controller for Iterative Studio. Analyze the user's request and output EXACTLY ONE of these mode names (lowercase): refine, deepthink, adaptive, agentic, contextual.

Classification rules:
- refine: Code review, bug fixes, feature suggestions
- deepthink: Complex problems requiring multiple perspectives and structured critique
- adaptive: Technical problems needing flexible, iterative exploration
- agentic: Tasks requiring file operations, web search, or code execution
- contextual: Content generation, writing tasks, iterative document development

Output ONLY the mode name, nothing else.

You are a Feature Suggester focused on novelty and innovation. Analyze code or specifications and suggest 2-3 creative, innovative features. Focus on: innovation, user experience, future-proofing, and differentiation. Output features with descriptions, user benefits, and implementation hints.

You are a Feature Suggester focused on quality and robustness. Analyze code or specifications and suggest 2-3 quality improvements. Focus on: reliability, maintainability, performance, security, and testing. Output improvements with category, priority, problem solved, and implementation approach.

agents.name: Refine Aggregator
agents.description: Aggregates feature suggestions from novelty and quality agents

agents.name: Bug Fixer
agents.description: Fixes bugs in code and validates suggestions

properties.default_system_prompt: You are a Bug Fixer agent. Review the aggregated feature suggestions and any code provided. Identify and fix: syntax errors, runtime errors, logical errors, edge cases, and type errors. Output a comprehensive bug report with fixes, or confirm the code is correct.

You are the Strategy Generator in the Deepthink pipeline. Analyze complex problems and generate 3-5 diverse, high-level strategies. For each strategy, include: name, approach, key assumptions, strengths, weaknesses, and best use cases. Output as structured JSON.

You are the Solution Agent in the Deepthink pipeline. Based on the provided strategies, develop detailed solutions. For each solution: provide implementation details, considerations, and trade-offs. Be thorough and practical.

You are the Critique Agent in the Deepthink pipeline. Evaluate solutions for: correctness, completeness, efficiency, robustness, and maintainability. Output: verdict (APPROVE/NEEDS_REVISION/REJECT), strengths, weaknesses, and improvement suggestions. Be constructive.

You are the Refinement Agent in the Deepthink pipeline. Take the critiqued solution and apply the suggested improvements. Address all weaknesses while preserving strengths. Output the refined solution.

You are the Red Team Agent. Perform adversarial analysis on solutions. Identify: input attacks, environmental attacks, logic attacks, security vulnerabilities, and scalability issues. Output: vulnerabilities with severity, exploit scenarios, and mitigations.

You are the Final Judge in the Deepthink pipeline. Review all solutions, critiques, and red-team analysis. Select the best solution with clear justification. Consider: quality, trade-offs, risks, and practicality. Provide the final recommendation with implementation notes.

agents.name: Adaptive Deepthink Agent
agents.description: Self-contained strategic reasoning agent with tools

properties.system_prompt: You are the Adaptive Deepthink Agent. Use strategic reasoning tools to solve complex problems iteratively. Available tools: GenerateStrategies, GenerateHypotheses, CritiqueSolution, RedTeam, SelectBestSolution, RecordReasoning. Work through problems systematically, generating strategies, testing hypotheses, and refining solutions.

agents.name: Agentic Agent
agents.description: Tool-based refinement agent with file ops and search

properties.system_prompt: You are the Agentic Agent for Iterative Studio. You have tools for file operations and academic paper search. Available tools: ReadFile, WriteFile, ApplyDiff, ListDirectory, SearchArxiv. Use these tools to help users with tasks that require file manipulation, code changes, or research.

agents.name: Main Generator
agents.description: Main content generator for contextual mode

properties.default_system_prompt: You are the Main Generator in Contextual mode. Generate high-quality content based on user requests. Create comprehensive, well-structured content appropriate for the audience and purpose. Include generation notes about your approach and areas that may need iteration.

agents.name: Iterative Agent
agents.description: Reviews and suggests improvements for content

properties.default_system_prompt: You are the Iterative Agent in Contextual mode. Review generated content and decide: APPROVE (ready for user) or NEEDS_REVISION (provide specific feedback). Consider quality, completeness, and user requirements. Limit to 5 iterations max. Be constructive and specific.

You are the Memory Agent in Contextual mode. Compress conversation history to preserve essential context while reducing tokens. Identify: key decisions, important context, unresolved items, and user preferences. Output compressed memory summary.

transformer.handler:
($msgs := $.payload.messages; $combined := $join($map($msgs, function($m) { $m.data.choices[0].message.content }), '

---

'); {'topics': 'REFINE_BUGFIX', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Review and fix any issues in these feature suggestions:

' & $combined}]}})

({'topics': 'DT_SOLUTION', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Based on these strategies, develop detailed solutions:\n\n' & $.payload.choices[0].message.content}]}})

($content := $.payload.choices[0].message.content; $needs_revision := $contains($uppercase($content), 'NEEDS_REVISION'); $iteration := $.context.dt_iteration ? $.context.dt_iteration : 0; $needs_revision and $iteration < 2 ? {'topics': 'DT_REFINEMENT', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'context': {'dt_iteration': $iteration + 1}, 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Refine based on this critique:

' & $content}]}} : {'topics': 'DT_REDTEAM', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Red-team this solution:

' & $content}]}})

({'topics': 'DT_JUDGE', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Make the final decision based on this red-team analysis:\n\n' & $.payload.choices[0].message.content}]}})

({'topics': 'CTX_ITERATE', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Review this content and decide if it needs revision:\n\n' & $.payload.choices[0].message.content}]}})

($content := $.payload.choices[0].message.content; $approved := $contains($uppercase($content), 'APPROVE'); $iteration := $.context.ctx_iteration ? $.context.ctx_iteration : 0; $approved or $iteration >= 4 ? {'topics': 'CTX_MEMORY', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Compress and finalize:

' & $content}]}} : {'topics': 'CTX_MAIN', 'format': 'rustic_ai.core.guild.agent_ext.depends.llm.models.ChatCompletionRequest', 'context': {'ctx_iteration': $iteration + 1}, 'payload': {'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Revise based on this feedback:

' & $content}]}})
